response.original_title: A Shrink A Flat & A Broken Key
response.overview: Grace's unconditional love for her son, Gordon, turns into a dangerous obsession as she fulfills his twisted desires. However, their lives turn upside down, when a stranger with car troubles, enters their isolated world. Gordon sees an opportunity to improve his killing skills with the help of the stranger, a criminal psychologist, who is willing to teach Gordon how to kill and not get caught in exchange for his life. But as their plan unfolds, and Graces jealousy turns to betrayal, Gordon must confront the truth about his past and decide whether to break free from his mother's grip or continue down a path of violence and manipulation. This psychological thriller will keep you guessing until the very end.
response.title: A Shrink A Flat & A Broken Key
